message:
feat(flow_lattice): add check_flow_with_obligation_hint for deterministic obligation binding

When multiple declassification obligations match the same source/sink pair,
check_flow() returned whichever appeared first in BTreeMap iteration order.
This was non-deterministic from the caller's perspective when the lowering
pipeline registered operation-local obligations.

Changes:
- Add check_flow_with_obligation_hint() which accepts an optional
  preferred_obligation_id — if provided and the obligation matches
  source/sink/remaining uses, it is used directly; otherwise the flow
  is blocked (fail-closed, no fallback to arbitrary matching obligation)
- Existing check_flow() delegates to the new method with None hint
- lowering_pipeline build_ir2_flow_proof_artifact(): track the obligation_id
  registered for each declassification flow and pass it as the hint to
  check_flow_with_obligation_hint(), ensuring the proof artifact links
  each flow to its exact obligation rather than an arbitrary matching one
- Fix: obligation_id was consumed by register_obligation(); now cloned
  so it can be passed as the hint
- New test: ir2_flow_proof_artifact_keeps_distinct_obligation_ids_for_
  repeated_matching_flows verifies that two identical flows get distinct
  obligation IDs in the proof artifact

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
